heading: Regulations
label: 13643 Regulations
text: The Secretary shall issue regulations necessary to carry out subtitles B through F of this title and the amendments made by such subtitles not later than the expiration of the 6-month period beginning on . The regulations shall be issued after notice and opportunity for public comment pursuant to the provisions of (notwithstanding subsections (a)(2), (b)(B), and (d)(3) of such section).October 28, 1992section 553 of title 5
notes: References in TextSubtitles B through F of this title, referred to in text, mean subtitles B to F of title VI of , , , which enacted this chapter, amended sections 1437a, 1437c to 1437g, 1437, 1437, 1438, 8011, 8013, and 12705 of this title and , Banks and Banking, and enacted provisions set out as notes under and .Pub.
